title: ficus vitellina
intro: Ficus vitellina, also known as the Yellow Fig or Golden Fig, is a species of fig tree native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. It is a deciduous tree that is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The bark, leaves, and roots of Ficus vitellina have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and boosted immune system. Herbal preparations of Ficus vitellina can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
